construction.second_order_nuclear_germ: Tr sqrt(I+E)=3+1/2 Tr(E)-1/8 Tr(E^2)+O(E^3), E=K^dagger K-I
construction.germ_scope: used only when all singular values of K equal 1 within 1e-8
construction.quotient: 48 Grassmann directions minus the reconstructed residual SU(3) orbit

target_firewall.post_exposure_status: exploratory because NuFIT was already inspected during model development

honesty_boundary: This is a complete quotient-Hessian test of the unitary-saturated branches found by the retained four-start, 74-action search. It is not a proof that no other stationary branch exists. Rank-deficient K branches are nonsmooth for the nuclear norm and are not assigned a classical Hessian. The reachability construction alone does not specify the two right frames or a unique action coefficient vector, so it is not itself a complete vacuum-action point.
